page: Amazon Web Services r8in.xlarge is an x86_64 architecture memory-optimized server instance. It is equipped with an Intel processor operating at a clock speed of 3.9 GHz. The instance features 4 virtual CPUs mapped to 2 physical cores with 2 threads per core, utilizing dedicated CPU allocation. It is built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor.

The instance is configured with 32.0 GB of system memory, providing a ratio of 8.0 GB of RAM per vCPU. It does not include local storage, meaning all storage requirements must be met via network-attached volumes. There are no integrated GPUs.

Network connectivity is supported by a baseline bandwidth of 6 Gbps. As a memory-optimized and EBS-optimized generation 8 instance, the r8in.xlarge is designed for workloads requiring higher memory-to-CPU ratios, such as relational databases, in-memory caches, and real-time data processing, where local storage is not a prerequisite.
description: Amazon Web Services r8in.xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server instance powered by the Nitro hypervisor. It features an Intel processor running at 3.9 GHz with 4 dedicated vCPUs across 2 physical cores. The hardware configuration includes 32.0 GB of system memory, yielding a high memory-to-vCPU ratio of 8.0 GB per vCPU. This instance does not include local storage or graphics processing units, relying instead on network-attached storage. It provides a baseline network bandwidth of 6 Gbps. The r8in.xlarge is designed for memory-intensive workloads, including database management systems, in-memory caching, and enterprise applications that benefit from a high memory footprint relative to compute resources.
og_description: Amazon Web Services r8in.xlarge is an x86_64 memory-optimized server featuring 4 dedicated vCPUs, 32.0 GB of RAM, and a 3.9 GHz Intel processor, designed for database and in-memory caching workloads.

tagline: A memory-optimized x86_64 virtual server featuring dedicated Intel processors and high memory-to-CPU allocation for memory-intensive workloads.

32.0 GB of system memory providing 8.0 GB per vCPU
6 Gbps baseline network bandwidth with EBS optimization
Built on the AWS Nitro hypervisor with x86_64 architecture
Designed for in-memory databases, caching, and enterprise applications
